name: linGetMeasEdgeTimeDiffs
title: linGetMeasEdgeTimeDiffs
description: This function retrieves the result of a falling edge difference measurement which has been started with linMeasEdgeTimeDiffs. Note that for each byte measured four time differences will be returned, although all of them might be 0 (if there had been only one falling edge in the measured byte). This means that time differences 0 to 3 contain the values for the first measured byte, time differences 4 to 7 contain the values for the second measured byte, etc.
The results are sorted in ascending order by the indices of the measured bytes.

parameters.name: arrSize
parameters.description: The size of the timeDiffs array.

parameters.name: timeDiffs
parameters.description: The array which will receive the measured time differences. The unit of the measured times is nanoseconds. The first time difference of a byte always relates to the falling edge of the start bit.

return: Returns the number of time differences copied into the timeDiffs-array.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
